Label: Planned Treatment for Period 01 (N)
Derivation: TRT01PN = numeric code for TRT01P (Placebo=0, Test Drug=1) stored as character

Label: Actual Treatment for Period 01 (N)
Derivation: TRT01AN = numeric code for TRT01A (Placebo=0, Test Drug=1) stored as character

Label: End of Treatment Status
Derivation: EOTSTT = 'COMPLETED' if TRTEDT not missing else 'ONGOING'

Label: Safety Population Flag
Derivation: SAFFL = 'Y' if subject has >=1 EX record else 'N'

Label: Intent-to-Treat Population Flag
Derivation: ITTFL = 'Y' for all randomized subjects (toy study)
